name: MIRA PHARMACEUTICALS, INC.
summary: PART I ITEM 1. Description of Business Overview MIRA Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: MIRA, the Company, we, us) is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical development company advancing a pipeline of novel oral therapeutics targeting neurologic, neuropsychiatric, metabolic, and addiction-related disorders. The Company holds exclusive rights in the United States, Canada, and Mexico to Ketamir-2, MIRA-55, and SKNY-1, three drug candidates designed to address significant unmet medical needs across neuropathi...
